_comment2: Copy this to config.json and fill in wallet_address
_threads_help: -1 = all cores, or set to specific number (e.g. 4 for big cores only)
_worker_name_help: Identifies this device in logs. Use unique names per phone for tracking.
_coinbase_tag_help: Text embedded in mined blocks. Max ~20 chars, alphanumeric + basic punctuation.
_target_help: SoC build target. 'auto' = detect automatically. Or specify: sd888, sd888_x1, tensor_g3, generic_v82, etc.
_rpc_password_help: Auto-generated if empty. Only needed if you want to connect external tools.
_dbcache_help: MB of RAM for UTXO cache. 256 is good for 12GB phones. Use 128 for 4-6GB phones.
_addnodes_help: Extra peer addresses to connect to. Example: ["10.69.3.79:8333", "seed.capstash.io:8333"]
_autostart_help: If true, run.sh starts mining immediately after sync. If false, only syncs chain.
